page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the ecs.g5.2xlarge delivers modest processing capabilities. Its single-core and multi-core CPU performance, measured via stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25% tier. Similarly, memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is weak, though large-block uncached read and write operations achieve average tier results. Cryptographic and compression tasks, such as single-threaded gzip compression, show poor performance, placing in the bottom 10% of tested instances.

Due to its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource ratio, the instance provides predictable execution for general-purpose workloads. However, the lack of local storage and lower-tier CPU benchmark scores represent a tradeoff for compute-intensive or high-I/O database applications. It is best suited for moderate web serving, basic application hosting, and lightweight background processing tasks that require a stable memory-to-vCPU ratio without demanding high-throughput computational power.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate modest capabilities, with single-core and multi-core CPU metrics generally ranking in the bottom 25%, while large-block memory bandwidth performs in the average tier. Given these characteristics, the ecs.g5.2xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated resources without high computational intensity. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, moderate web serving, and lightweight background processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, suitable for moderate web serving and general workloads.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose virtual machine offering a balanced resource profile for moderate application hosting and standard background processing tasks.

32.0 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
